items.title: Bills sign FB Ben VanSumeren to a one-year deal
items.summary: The Bills signed fullback Ben VanSumeren to a one-year deal on Wednesday, the team announced.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jannik Sinner ends hopes of fast-rising teenager Rafael Jodar at Madrid Open
items.summary: World No 1 halts Jodar’s run 6-2, 7-6 (0) in quarter-finals Anastasia Potapova beats Karolina Pliskova in three sets Jannik Sinner ended the inspired run of teen home favourite...

items.title: VAR controversially overturns Arsenal penalty
items.summary: Watch the moment an Arsenal penalty for a foul on Eberechi Eze by Atletico Madrid's David Hancko is overturned by VAR in their Champions League first-leg tie.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
